creator: kellnerp@earthlink.net
text:
Building /usr/ports/security/maia

Fails at 
===>  Cleaning for maia-1.0.4_5
Unknown extension wddx for PHP 74.

wddx is deprecated for PHP 7.4 AFAIK Shouldn't be trying to build this option.

FreeBSD NOVA-1 12.2-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p4 GENERIC  amd64
